about.en: Quant provides Overledger, infrastructure for connecting blockchains, distributed ledgers, and existing financial systems. QNT is the Ethereum-based token associated with access and usage in the Quant Network ecosystem.
about.es: Quant proporciona Overledger, infraestructura para conectar blockchains, registros distribuidos y sistemas financieros existentes. QNT es el token basado en Ethereum asociado al acceso y uso dentro del ecosistema Quant Network.
about.ca: Quant proporciona Overledger, infraestructura per connectar blockchains, registres distribuits i sistemes financers existents. QNT es el token basat en Ethereum associat a l acces i us dins l ecosistema Quant Network.
